creator: hk@alogis.com
text:
After upgrading to 6.2-PRERELEASE and using the new 
iwi-port (net/iwi-firmware-kmod), problem has gone 
and it looks like I can switch between 11b and 11g 
without problems if interface is down.

Great!

Only problem now is that ifconfig iwi0 up won't switch
on the nice blue wlan-indicator-light on my laptop which 
it did with 6.1-RELEASE-p6 and the older /net/iwi-firmware

Regards,
Holger Kipp
